assertions.description: INCORRECT: The charger_stepup schematic uses global labels 'IN+' and 'IN-' as power input terminals for a LiPo battery charger (connected to TP4056 VCC and power capacitors). The differential_pairs detector classifies them as a differential signal pair with ESD protection and series resistors. These are single-ended DC power rails (battery positive/negative terminals), not a differential signal pair. R14/R15 are charge current programming resistors, not differential termination. The has_esd=true claim (attributing U3 TP4056 as ESD device) is also incorrect.

The charger_stepup schematic contains DW01 (LiPo battery protection IC with overcharge/overdischarge/overcurrent protection) and FS8205A (dual N-channel MOSFET for battery protection cutoff). Both are canonical battery protection devices. The protection_devices detector returns []. The DW01 has its CS (current sense) pin connected to a sense resistor R16, which is a typical protection topology. These should be detected as BMS/protection components.
